message:
Revamp hash functions (#5574)

This PR replaces our hand-rolled MD5 and SHA functions with OpenSSL
implementations.

Bonus: we now also have functions for the SHA3 family.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+---
+title: "OpenSSL hash backend and SHA3 functions"
+type: feature
+authors: mavam
+pr: 5574
+---
+
+All `hash_*` functions (MD5/SHA1/SHA2) now use OpenSSL's EVP implementation
+instead of the previous digestpp copies. We've also added SHA3-224/256/384/512
+variants to the `hash_*` family.
+
+Here's how you compute a SHA3 hash digest:
+
+```tql
+from {x: hash_sha3_256("foo")}
+```
+
+```tql
+{x: "76d3bc41c9f588f7fcd0d5bf4718f8f84b1c41b20882703100b9eb9413807c01"}
+```

@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+---
+title: hash_sha3_224
+category: Hashing
+example: 'hash_sha3_224("foo")'
+---
+
+Computes a SHA3-224 hash digest.
+
+```tql
+hash_sha3_224(x:any, [seed=string]) -> string
+```
+
+## Description
+
+The `hash_sha3_224` function calculates a SHA3-224 hash digest for the given
+value `x`.
+
+## Examples
+
+### Compute a SHA3-224 digest of a string
+
+```tql
+from {x: hash_sha3_224("foo")}
+```
+
+```tql
+{x: "f4f6779e153c391bbd29c95e72b0708e39d9166c7cea51d1f10ef58a"}
+```
+
+## See Also
+
+[`hash_md5`](/reference/functions/hash_md5),
+[`hash_sha1`](/reference/functions/hash_sha1),
+[`hash_sha224`](/reference/functions/hash_sha224),
+[`hash_sha256`](/reference/functions/hash_sha256),
+[`hash_sha384`](/reference/functions/hash_sha384),
+[`hash_sha512`](/reference/functions/hash_sha512),
+[`hash_sha3_256`](/reference/functions/hash_sha3_256),
+[`hash_sha3_384`](/reference/functions/hash_sha3_384),
+[`hash_sha3_512`](/reference/functions/hash_sha3_512),
+[`hash_xxh3`](/reference/functions/hash_xxh3)

@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+---
+title: hash_sha3_256
+category: Hashing
+example: 'hash_sha3_256("foo")'
+---
+
+Computes a SHA3-256 hash digest.
+
+```tql
+hash_sha3_256(x:any, [seed=string]) -> string
+```
+
+## Description
+
+The `hash_sha3_256` function calculates a SHA3-256 hash digest for the given
+value `x`.
+
+## Examples
+
+### Compute a SHA3-256 digest of a string
+
+```tql
+from {x: hash_sha3_256("foo")}
+```
+
+```tql
+{x: "76d3bc41c9f588f7fcd0d5bf4718f8f84b1c41b20882703100b9eb9413807c01"}
+```
+
+## See Also
+
+[`hash_md5`](/reference/functions/hash_md5),
+[`hash_sha1`](/reference/functions/hash_sha1),
+[`hash_sha224`](/reference/functions/hash_sha224),
+[`hash_sha256`](/reference/functions/hash_sha256),
+[`hash_sha384`](/reference/functions/hash_sha384),
+[`hash_sha512`](/reference/functions/hash_sha512),
+[`hash_sha3_224`](/reference/functions/hash_sha3_224),
+[`hash_sha3_384`](/reference/functions/hash_sha3_384),
+[`hash_sha3_512`](/reference/functions/hash_sha3_512),
+[`hash_xxh3`](/reference/functions/hash_xxh3)

@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+---
+title: hash_sha3_384
+category: Hashing
+example: 'hash_sha3_384("foo")'
+---
+
+Computes a SHA3-384 hash digest.
+
+```tql
+hash_sha3_384(x:any, [seed=string]) -> string
+```
+
+## Description
+
+The `hash_sha3_384` function calculates a SHA3-384 hash digest for the given
+value `x`.
+
+## Examples
+
+### Compute a SHA3-384 digest of a string
+
+```tql
+from {x: hash_sha3_384("foo")}
+```
+
+```tql
+{x: "665551928d13b7d84ee02734502b018d896a0fb87eed5adb4c87ba91bbd6489410e11b0fbcc06ed7d0ebad559e5d3bb5"}
+```
+
+## See Also

+[`hash_sha224`](/reference/functions/hash_sha224),
+[`hash_sha256`](/reference/functions/hash_sha256),
+[`hash_sha384`](/reference/functions/hash_sha384),
+[`hash_sha512`](/reference/functions/hash_sha512),
+[`hash_sha3_224`](/reference/functions/hash_sha3_224),
+[`hash_sha3_256`](/reference/functions/hash_sha3_256),
+[`hash_sha3_512`](/reference/functions/hash_sha3_512),
+[`hash_xxh3`](/reference/functions/hash_xxh3)

@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+---
+title: hash_sha3_512
+category: Hashing
+example: 'hash_sha3_512("foo")'
+---
+
+Computes a SHA3-512 hash digest.
+
+```tql
+hash_sha3_512(x:any, [seed=string]) -> string
+```
+
+## Description
+
+The `hash_sha3_512` function calculates a SHA3-512 hash digest for the given
+value `x`.
+
+## Examples
+
+### Compute a SHA3-512 digest of a string
+
+```tql
+from {x: hash_sha3_512("foo")}
+```
+
+```tql
+{x: "4bca2b137edc580fe50a88983ef860ebaca36c857b1f492839d6d7392452a63c82cbebc68e3b70a2a1480b4bb5d437a7cba6ecf9d89f9ff3ccd14cd6146ea7e7"}
+```
+
+## See Also
+
+[`hash_md5`](/reference/functions/hash_md5),
+[`hash_sha1`](/reference/functions/hash_sha1),
+[`hash_sha224`](/reference/functions/hash_sha224),
+[`hash_sha256`](/reference/functions/hash_sha256),
+[`hash_sha384`](/reference/functions/hash_sha384),
+[`hash_sha512`](/reference/functions/hash_sha512),
+[`hash_sha3_224`](/reference/functions/hash_sha3_224),
+[`hash_sha3_256`](/reference/functions/hash_sha3_256),
+[`hash_sha3_384`](/reference/functions/hash_sha3_384),
+[`hash_xxh3`](/reference/functions/hash_xxh3)

+  0xb40bbe37L, 0xc30c8ea1L, 0x5a05df1bL, 0x2d02ef8dL};
 
 #define DO1(buf) crc = crc_table[((int)crc ^ (*buf++)) & 0xff] ^ (crc >> 8);
-#define DO2(buf) DO1(buf); DO1(buf);
-#define DO4(buf) DO2(buf); DO2(buf);
-#define DO8(buf) DO4(buf); DO4(buf);
+#define DO2(buf)                                                               \
+  DO1(buf);                                                                    \
+  DO1(buf);
+#define DO4(buf)                                                               \
+  DO2(buf);                                                                    \
+  DO2(buf);
+#define DO8(buf)                                                               \
+  DO4(buf);                                                                    \
+  DO4(buf);
 
-void crc(const void * key, int len, uint32_t seed, void * out) {
+void crc(const void* key, int len, uint32_t seed, void* out) {
   auto* buf = (uint8_t*)key;
   uint32_t crc = seed ^ 0xffffffffL;
   while (len >= 8) {
     DO8(buf);
     len -= 8;
   }
-  while(len--)
+  while (len--) {
     DO1(buf);
+  }
   crc ^= 0xffffffffL;
   *(uint32_t*)out = crc;
 }
 
-} // namespace <anonymous>
+} // namespace
+
+crc32::crc32(seed_type seed) noexcept : digest_{seed}, seed_{seed} {
+}
 
-crc32::crc32(seed_type seed) noexcept : digest_{seed} {
+void crc32::reset() noexcept {
+  digest_ = seed_;
 }
 
 void crc32::add(std::span<const std::byte> bytes) noexcept {
